stories.title: Edit username (one-time only)
stories.description: User can update their display name once after registration. After editing, the name field becomes read-only.
acceptanceCriteria: Family settings shows current username with an Edit button
Clicking Edit allows typing a new name and saving via PUT /api/auth
After saving, the Edit button disappears and name is read-only (name_edited=1 in DB)
Backend rejects name change if name_edited is already 1
Nav avatar/name updates immediately after save

stories.title: Change password
stories.description: Users with email auth can change their password. Google-only users see a disabled state.
acceptanceCriteria: Family settings shows Change Password section for email auth users
Form has current password, new password (min 8 chars), confirm fields
Backend PUT /api/auth validates current password before updating
Google-only users see 'Signed in with Google' instead of password form
Success toast shown after password change

stories.title: AI custom question input
stories.description: Users can type a custom question/prompt for AI analysis instead of only using the default analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard AI card has a text input for custom questions
User can type e.g. 'With 30M income, how is my financial health?'
Custom question is appended to the AI prompt sent to /api/ai-analyze
Default Analyze button still works without custom question
AI response renders the same insights card with chart
